title: [epic] ELECROW ThinkNode M3 tracker support
description: ELECROW ThinkNode M3 card tracker: nRF52840 + LR1110 (915MHz). IP66 waterproof. Similar platform to T1000-E. Need board definition, pin mapping from manufacturer/Meshtastic, simulation, hardware validation.
close_reason: Epic completed with all children closed: driver, boards, tests, simulation, codereviews.
